order.description: All sprint folders in chronological/priority order. Driver scans active ones; archived are skipped.

globalContext.description: Path to the cross-sprint context file every implementer reads.

decisionsLog.description: Append-only log of every completed task summary.

maxParallel.description: Max concurrent implementer spawns per wave.

checkpointEvery.description: Show interactive checkpoint after every N completed tasks.

autoPushAfterClean.description: When true, after sprint completes with all green, prompt user once for push (still requires confirmation).

cleanupPushedWorktrees.description: After human pushes branch, auto-remove the worktree.
